|  | MAGT | [Magadan Time](/wiki/Magadan_Time "Magadan Time") | [UTC+11](/wiki/UTC%2B11:00 "UTC+11:00") | (MSK+8) |
|  | PETT | [Kamchatka Time](/wiki/Kamchatka_Time "Kamchatka Time") | [UTC+12](/wiki/UTC%2B12:00 "UTC+12:00") | (MSK+9) |

**UTC+05:00** is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of +05:00. This time is used in:

## As standard time (year-round)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: As standard time (year-round)")]

Principal cities: [Astana](/wiki/Astana "Astana"), [Almaty](/wiki/Almaty "Almaty"), [Kokshetau](/wiki/Kokshetau "Kokshetau"), [Tashkent](/wiki/Tashkent "Tashkent"), [Ashgabat](/wiki/Ashgabat "Ashgabat"), [Dushanbe](/wiki/Dushanbe "Dushanbe"), [Malé](/wiki/Mal%C3%A9 "Malé"), [Yekaterinburg](/wiki/Yekaterinburg "Yekaterinburg"), [Martin-de-Viviès](/wiki/Martin-de-Vivi%C3%A8s "Martin-de-Viviès"), [Port-aux-Français](/wiki/Port-aux-Fran%C3%A7ais "Port-aux-Français"), [Aktobe](/wiki/Aktobe "Aktobe"), [Atyrau](/wiki/Atyrau "Atyrau"), [Kyzylorda](/wiki/Kyzylorda "Kyzylorda"), [Aktau](/wiki/Aktau "Aktau"), [Islamabad](/wiki/Islamabad "Islamabad"), [Karachi](/wiki/Karachi "Karachi")

### South Asia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: South Asia")]

* Maldives – [Time in the Maldives](/wiki/Time_in_the_Maldives "Time in the Maldives")
* Pakistan - [Time in Pakistan](/wiki/Time_in_Pakistan "Time in Pakistan")

### Central Asia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Central Asia")]

* Kazakhstan – [Time in Kazakhstan](/wiki/Time_in_Kazakhstan "Time in Kazakhstan")[[1]](#cite_note-wtzcis-1)
* Tajikistan – [Time in Tajikistan](/wiki/Time_in_Tajikistan "Time in Tajikistan")
* Turkmenistan – [Time in Turkmenistan](/wiki/Time_in_Turkmenistan "Time in Turkmenistan")
* Uzbekistan – [Time in Uzbekistan](/wiki/Time_in_Uzbekistan "Time in Uzbekistan")

### Eastern Europe

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Eastern Europe")]

* Russia – [Yekaterinburg Time](/wiki/Yekaterinburg_Time "Yekaterinburg Time")[[2]](#cite_note-wtzruss-2)
* [Volga Federal District](/wiki/Volga_Federal_District "Volga Federal District")
  + [Bashkortostan](/wiki/Bashkortostan "Bashkortostan"), [Orenburg Oblast](/wiki/Orenburg_Oblast "Orenburg Oblast") and [Perm Krai](/wiki/Perm_Krai "Perm Krai")
* [Ural Federal District](/wiki/Ural_Federal_District "Ural Federal District")
  + [Chelyabinsk Oblast](/wiki/Chelyabinsk_Oblast "Chelyabinsk Oblast"), [Khanty-Mansi Autonomous Okrug](/wiki/Khanty-Mansi_Autonomous_Okrug "Khanty-Mansi Autonomous Okrug"), [Kurgan Oblast](/wiki/Kurgan_Oblast "Kurgan Oblast"), [Sverdlovsk Oblast](/wiki/Sverdlovsk_Oblast "Sverdlovsk Oblast"), [Tyumen Oblast](/wiki/Tyumen_Oblast "Tyumen Oblast") and [Yamalo-Nenets Autonomous Okrug](/wiki/Yamalo-Nenets_Autonomous_Okrug "Yamalo-Nenets Autonomous Okrug")

### Antarctica

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Antarctica")]

#### Southern Ocean

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Southern Ocean")]

* France
  + [Kerguelen Islands](/wiki/Kerguelen_Islands "Kerguelen Islands")
  + [Île Saint Paul](/wiki/%C3%8Ele_Saint_Paul "Île Saint Paul") and [Île Amsterdam](/wiki/%C3%8Ele_Amsterdam "Île Amsterdam")
* Australia
  + [Heard Island and McDonald Islands](/wiki/Heard_Island_and_McDonald_Islands "Heard Island and McDonald Islands")
* Some bases in [Antarctica](/wiki/Antarctica "Antarctica"). See also [Time in Antarctica](/wiki/Time_in_Antarctica "Time in Antarctica").
  + Australia
    - [Mawson Station](/wiki/Mawson_Station "Mawson Station")
  + Russia
    - [Vostok Station](/wiki/Vostok_Station "Vostok Station")

Armenia and Azerbaijan used this as [daylight saving time](/wiki/Daylight_saving_time "Daylight saving time") (DST) in 1981–2012 and 1981–2016 respectively, called [Armenia Summer Time](/wiki/Armenia_Time "Armenia Time") (AMST) and [Azerbaijan Summer Time](/wiki/Time_in_Azerbaijan "Time in Azerbaijan") (AZST).

## Discrepancies between official UTC+05:00 and geographical UTC+05:00

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Discrepancies between official UTC+05:00 and geographical UTC+05:00")]

### Areas in UTC+05:00 longitudes using other time zones

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Areas in UTC+05:00 longitudes using other time zones")]

Using [UTC+08:00](/wiki/UTC%2B08:00 "UTC+08:00"):

* China
  + Parts of western areas in the country, including western [Xinjiang](/wiki/Xinjiang "Xinjiang") province ([Kashgar](/wiki/Kashgar "Kashgar")) (although most locals observe UTC+06:00)

Using [UTC+07:00](/wiki/UTC%2B07:00 "UTC+07:00"):

* Russia
  + Most parts of [Novosibirsk Oblast](/wiki/Novosibirsk_Oblast "Novosibirsk Oblast")
  + Partly of [Tomsk Oblast](/wiki/Tomsk_Oblast "Tomsk Oblast")

Using [UTC+06:00](/wiki/UTC%2B06:00 "UTC+06:00"):

* Kyrgyzstan
* [British Indian Ocean Territory](/wiki/British_Indian_Ocean_Territory "British Indian Ocean Territory")
* Russia
  + [Omsk Oblast](/wiki/Omsk_Oblast "Omsk Oblast")

Using [UTC+05:45](/wiki/UTC%2B05:45 "UTC+05:45"):

* Nepal
  + Parts of western in the country, including:
    - [Sudurpashchim](/wiki/Sudurpashchim_Province "Sudurpashchim Province")
    - mostly part of [Karnali](/wiki/Karnali_Province "Karnali Province")
    - western part of [Lumbini](/wiki/Lumbini_Province "Lumbini Province")

Using [UTC+05:30](/wiki/UTC%2B05:30 "UTC+05:30"):

* Sri Lanka
* India, with parts of its territories:
  + [Gujarat](/wiki/Gujarat "Gujarat")
  + [Rajasthan](/wiki/Rajasthan "Rajasthan")
  + [Punjab](/wiki/Punjab,_India "Punjab, India")
  + [Ladakh](/wiki/Ladakh "Ladakh")
  + [Uttarakhand](/wiki/Uttarakhand "Uttarakhand")
  + [Maharashtra](/wiki/Maharashtra "Maharashtra")
  + [Telangana](/wiki/Telangana "Telangana")
  + [Karnataka](/wiki/Karnataka "Karnataka")
  + [Kerala](/wiki/Kerala "Kerala")
  + [Haryana](/wiki/Haryana "Haryana")
  + [Tamil Nadu](/wiki/Tamil_Nadu "Tamil Nadu")
  + [Himachal Pradesh](/wiki/Himachal_Pradesh "Himachal Pradesh")
  + [Madhya Pradesh](/wiki/Madhya_Pradesh "Madhya Pradesh")
  + [Jammu and Kashmir](/wiki/Jammu_and_Kashmir_(union_territory) "Jammu and Kashmir (union territory)")
  + [Delhi](/wiki/Delhi "Delhi"), including nation's capital [New Delhi](/wiki/New_Delhi "New Delhi")
  + A smaller parts of [Odisha](/wiki/Odisha "Odisha")
    - Most parts of [Uttar Pradesh](/wiki/Uttar_Pradesh "Uttar Pradesh")
    - Most parts of [Andhra Pradesh](/wiki/Andhra_Pradesh "Andhra Pradesh")
    - Southwest of [Chhattisgarh](/wiki/Chhattisgarh "Chhattisgarh")

Using [UTC+04:30](/wiki/UTC%2B04:30 "UTC+04:30"):

* Afghanistan
  + Eastern parts, where the nation's capital [Kabul](/wiki/Kabul "Kabul") is

Using [UTC+03:00](/wiki/UTC%2B03:00 "UTC+03:00"):

* Russia
  + The very east of [Severny Island](/wiki/Severny_Island "Severny Island") with 69°2' E as the easternmost point

### Areas outside UTC+05:00 longitudes using UTC+05:00 time

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Areas outside UTC+05:00 longitudes using UTC+05:00 time")]

#### Areas between 82°30' E and 97°30' E ("physical" UTC+06:00)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Areas between 82°30' E and 97°30' E (\"physical\" UTC+06:00)")]

* Russia
  + The very easternmost parts of Ural Federal District
* Kazakhstan
  + Parts of [East Kazakhstan](/wiki/East_Kazakhstan "East Kazakhstan")

#### Areas between 52°30' E and 67°30' E ("physical" UTC+04:00)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Areas between 52°30' E and 67°30' E (\"physical\" UTC+04:00)")]

* Turkmenistan
* Kazakhstan
  + Aktobe
  + Kyzylorda
  + Kostanay
  + parts of Mangystau, Atyrau, and West Kazakhstan
* Uzbekistan
  + Most parts, including [Samarkand](/wiki/Samarkand "Samarkand")
* Pakistan
  + Western parts, including [Karachi](/wiki/Karachi "Karachi")
* Russia
  + Most parts of Ural Federal District

#### Areas between 37°30' E and 52°30' E ("physical" UTC+03:00)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Areas between 37°30' E and 52°30' E (\"physical\" UTC+03:00)")]

* Russia
  + Western tip of Perm Krai
  + Western parts of the Orenburg Oblast

## Historical time offsets

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B05:00&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Historical time offsets")]

Kyrgyzstan adopted this time zone as its standard time from 2 May 1924 to 21 June 1930, and from 31 March 1991 to 12 August 2005.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]
